summary: Tested MEA (Multi-Electrode Array) feature phases 1-5 UI components. All navigation flows and UI elements are working correctly. Mode Selector shows SEM and MEA cards, MEA Upload page displays all 5 required CSV files with descriptions, back navigation works properly.
critical_code_review_comments: ModeSelector.js: SEM card has data-testid='mode-selector-sem', MEA card has data-testid='mode-selector-mea' - both properly implemented
ModeSelector.js: Both cards have InfoTooltip with proper descriptions for SEM and MEA recording types
MEAUpload.js: EXPECTED_FILES array correctly lists all 5 required CSV files: spike_list.csv, electrode_burst_list.csv, network_burst_list.csv, spike_counts.csv, environmental_data.csv
MEAUpload.js: Parse Files button has data-testid='mea-parse-btn' and is correctly disabled until all files are uploaded
MEAConfig.js: All 5 configuration sections implemented - Spontaneous Activity (baseline), Light Stimulation, Drug Application, Electrode Filter, Binning Settings
MEAConfig.js: Each section is collapsible using ConfigSection component with expanded/collapsed state
MEAAnalysis.js: Implements spike rate computation, burst rate computation, raster plots, and correlation analysis
App.js: Correct view routing for 'mea-upload', 'mea-config', 'mea-analysis' states
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEA phases 1-5 UI tested. Key data-testids: mode-selector-sem, mode-selector-mea, mea-parse-btn, mea-proceed-btn, mea-config-proceed-btn. MEA requires uploading 5 CSV files to progress beyond upload page. Test data exists at /app/mea_test_data/

features_verified.mode_selector_displays: PASS - Mode Selector shows both SEM and MEA cards with proper descriptions
features_verified.sem_card_clickable: PASS - SEM card navigates to SEM upload page (.abf files)
features_verified.mea_card_clickable: PASS - MEA card navigates to MEA Upload page
features_verified.mea_upload_title: PASS - 'Upload MEA Data' title displays correctly
features_verified.mea_upload_5_files_listed: PASS - All 5 required CSV files listed with descriptions (spike_list.csv, electrode_burst_list.csv, network_burst_list.csv, spike_counts.csv, environmental_data.csv)
features_verified.mea_upload_parse_button: PASS - Parse Files button present and disabled when no files uploaded
features_verified.back_navigation_to_mode_selector: PASS - 'Back to Mode Selection' button returns to Mode Selector
features_verified.mea_config_sections_in_code: PASS - MEAConfig.js has all 5 sections: Spontaneous Activity, Light Stimulation, Drug Application, Electrode Filter, Binning Settings
